preceding_heading: 3.4. Outcomes of Very Old Septic and Non-Septic Patients
3.5. Factors Associated with 30-Day Mortality in Patients with Sepsis
markdown:
Table 4. Significant risk factors for 30-day mortality in patients with sepsis in weighted logistic regression analyses ( n = 640).

|                            | Univariate a   | Univariate a   | Univariate a   | Multivariable b   | Multivariable b   | Multivariable b   |
|----------------------------|----------------|----------------|----------------|-------------------|-------------------|-------------------|
| Variable                   | OR             | 95% CI         | P -Value       | OR                | 95% CI            | P -Value          |
| Chronic renal disease      | 2.60           | 1.40 to 4.83   | 0.003          | 2.57              | 1.35 to 4.89      | 0.004             |
| Diabetes mellitus          | 0.49           | 0.22 to 0.88   | 0.021          | 0.44              | 0.21 to 0.89      | 0.023             |
| Neurologic chronic disease | 2.68           | 1.60 to 4.50   | < 0.001        | 2.80              | 1.62 to 4.85      | < 0.001           |
| Nursing home               | 2.19           | 1.21 to 3.94   | < 0.001        | -                 | -                 | -                 |
| PSI risk class IV-V        | 4.09           | 0.98 to 17.0   | 0.054          | -                 | -                 | -                 |
